rationale: The cited paper focuses on integrating customer mind-set metrics into dynamic market response models (VARX/GFEVD), whereas the citing paper note emphasizes business-cycle effects on price/advertising elasticities estimated via brand-level error-correction models and 3SLS. The match evidence is only a DOI-level reference entry, with no citation context showing how it is used. Substantive use is possible but not established from the provided evidence.
